Career Studio

Create, manage and play your own Guitar Hero style campaigns

Two powerful tools

Design your own career with unique blocks and songs, then play and track your progress with a star-based unlock system.

Create career Load & play
Create career – build your campaign, add blocks and songs, export JSON.
Load & play – import JSON, earn stars, unlock stages automatically.

How to create a campaign

1 Fill campaign details: name, description, cover, instrument, soundpack link, background image.
2 Add blocks (stages) with unlock cost (any number of stars) and optional cover.
3 Inside each block add songs with difficulty from 1 to 6 (● circles).
4 Drag & drop blocks/songs to reorder. Inline edit any text or cost. Copy blocks/songs.
5 Export final campaign as JSON file – ready to be played!

How to play & track progress

1 Load your campaign JSON file into the Tracker page.
2 See all blocks locked by default – each block requires a certain amount of stars to unlock.
3 For each song, enter how many stars you earned (any number). Total stars sum up automatically.
4 When you reach the unlock cost, the block becomes available and you can start earning stars for its songs.
5 Complete all songs to get a congratulation message. Progress is saved automatically in your browser.
